headline: The Best Artificial Intelligence (AI) Growth Stocks After the Helium Shock Are the Ones That Don't Need the Strait of Hormuz
summary: The helium crisis revealed a hidden truth about AI investing: The companies with the least supply chain risk may be the software platforms quietly powering the entire ecosystem.
